title: limnorchis × lassenii
side_effects: Limnorchis × lassenii can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including skin irritation, hives, and itching. Ingesting the plant's leaves or flowers can cause gastrointestinal issues, such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. If the plant's sap comes into contact with the eyes, it may cause redness, irritation, and blurred vision. Long-term exposure to the plant's toxins can also lead to more severe health issues, including liver and kidney damage.
